nodes.label: Class C — Recorded Product Decisions & Known Deviations
nodes.norm_label: class c — recorded product decisions & known deviations

nodes.label: Mail-Merge Envelopes/Labels Page Geometry Deferral (D10.10, Class A)
nodes.rationale: PM mode inserts REAL content honestly — envelopes prepend a real PM page, labels build a real PM label grid. Avery-grid page fidelity (true envelope/label sheet geometry), Labels→Print, and updateLabels «Next Record» propagation across a PM label table are deferred to Phase 7 because they depend on real page layout. No E() mutation is reachable in PM mode (leak audit clean).
nodes.norm_label: mail-merge envelopes/labels page geometry deferral (d10.10, class a)

nodes.label: D10.9 — Rule-Field IF Operator Semantics Deferral (Class C)
nodes.rationale: IF/FILLIN/ASK/SKIPIF/SET rule fields export as structurally-valid field codes but the IF OPERATOR is not mapped — legacy dialog builds 'Equal to' but Word's syntax is '='. An exported IF won't auto-evaluate in Word (it round-trips as inert-but-valid). Parity with the legacy engine which never evaluated rule fields. Follow-up: map operator labels in ifThenElseDialog.
nodes.norm_label: d10.9 — rule-field if operator semantics deferral (class c)

nodes.label: D10.12 — Composite ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE Import Placeholder Deviation (Class C)
nodes.rationale: A previewed/merged ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE imported from Word comes in as the «…» placeholder, not the rendered multi-line text. The sd:mergeField translator reconstructs displayLabel from the field instruction and discards the cached result runs. A plain MERGEFIELD is lossless (cached run IS just «Name»). Follow-up: extract cached text into displayLabel when it differs from the placeholder.
nodes.norm_label: d10.12 — composite addressblock/greetingline import placeholder deviation (class c)

nodes.label: SEQ/CITATION Complex Field Import Gap (Fork Converter Limitation, Slice 9)
nodes.rationale: Word→clone import: the fork docx converter drops SEQ caption + CITATION complex fields → nodes. Footnotes + TOC import faithfully; an imported caption keeps its literal text but loses the SEQ number; an imported managed citation vanishes. Prioritized fork-importer follow-up to map w:fldChar+w:instrText SEQ/CITATION fields to sequenceField/citation nodes. Pre-existing fork limitation, not a slice-9 wiring defect.
nodes.norm_label: seq/citation complex field import gap (fork converter limitation, slice 9)

nodes.label: Slice 10 PR 1 (Mail-Merge) DONE Checkpoint
nodes.rationale: area mail-merge FLIPPED with maximal real-MS-Word fidelity using real MERGEFIELD field codes (not w:sdt content controls). Six gates green: PM 285/285, legacy 257, smoke 9/9 ×2, roundtrip 27/0, docx 17/0. Oracle Leg A clone→Word PASS; Leg B Word→clone PASS (automated fixture import). Two-lens review caught 2 majors on gate-untested paths (fixed in e9e2242).

nodes.label: Real MERGEFIELD Round-Trip Design (Slice 10 PR 1)
nodes.rationale: User-directed maximal real-MS-Word fidelity: merge fields are real Word MERGEFIELD field codes (w:fldSimple/w:fldChar), NOT w:sdt content controls. The fork's mounted FieldAnnotation node backs preview/highlight/rules. No new PM node needed.

nodes.label: translate-field-annotation.js Export Branch (Fork Edit)
nodes.rationale: New export branch in translate-field-annotation.js: emits w:fldSimple for MERGEFIELD/GREETINGLINE, 5-run w:fldChar for ADDRESSBLOCK, and 3-run w:fldChar for NEXT (no spurious result run). Non-merge annotations still emit w:sdt unchanged (preserves test:roundtrip 27/0).

nodes.label: mergefield-preprocessor.js (Fork Import Stage-1)
nodes.rationale: Covers both fldSimple+fldChar forms via the registry. Registered for MERGEFIELD/ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE/NEXT and rule codes. Returns sd:mergeField OpenXmlNode.

nodes.label: sd:mergeField NodeTranslator (Fork Import Stage-2)
nodes.rationale: encode→fieldAnnotation, flag-independent of editor.options.annotations. Uses sdNodeOrKeyName='fieldAnnotation-mergeField' to avoid decode-routing collision with the w:sdt translator. decode returns null (export goes via translate-field-annotation.js).

nodes.label: generateV2HandlerEntity in docxImporter (Fork Import Stage-3)
nodes.rationale: The load-bearing 3rd wiring point caught by the critique. The node-list dispatcher is a separate v2 handler entity, NOT the v3 translatorList. Without this, passthroughNodeImporter refuses the node and it is dropped. Must be inserted before passthroughNodeHandlerEntity.

nodes.label: bridge/mail.ts — PM Mutation Surface for Mail-Merge
nodes.rationale: 8 verbs: mmInsertField/mmAddressBlock/mmGreetingLine/mmInsertRule/mmHighlight/non-destructive mmPreview via updateFieldAnnotations/PM-aware mmBuildMerge/mmFinishToNewDoc. Preview reads defaultDisplayLabel (not live displayLabel) so a second preview pass still resolves correctly.
nodes.norm_label: bridge/mail.ts — pm mutation surface for mail-merge

nodes.label: PM-Aware Finish & Merge Builder (mmBuildMerge)
nodes.rationale: Builds merged body from the PM document (PM.getHTML()), matching the PM annotation DOM (span.annotation[data-field-type], name from data-display-label), substituting record values via the clone's composite()/_val. Legacy fill() selects .wc-mergefield which is DEAD in PM — the PM-aware builder is mandatory (K-9).

nodes.label: Slice 10 Oracle Leg A — Clone→Word PASS
nodes.norm_label: slice 10 oracle leg a — clone→word pass

nodes.label: Slice 10 Oracle Leg B — Word→Clone PASS (Automated)
nodes.norm_label: slice 10 oracle leg b — word→clone pass (automated)

nodes.label: Non-Destructive Preview via updateFieldAnnotations (D10.6)
nodes.rationale: mmPreview(on): updateFieldAnnotations(fieldId, {displayLabel: value}) per field; OFF restores «name». No setHTML. Field NAME survives because mmPreview reads defaultDisplayLabel (which addFieldAnnotation stamps once and never overwrites), not the live displayLabel.

nodes.label: Leak Audit Clean (12 E() Calls All Behind Guards)
nodes.norm_label: leak audit clean (12 e() calls all behind guards)

nodes.label: Phase 2 Status — Slices 0a-9 + Slice-10 PR1 Done
nodes.norm_label: phase 2 status — slices 0a-9 + slice-10 pr1 done

nodes.label: D10.1 — Reuse FieldAnnotation, No New PM Node
nodes.rationale: Merge fields are fieldAnnotation nodes (type:'text', fieldType = the Word field code). Its update/highlight/hideByCondition commands back preview/highlight/rules. No new node needed.
nodes.norm_label: d10.1 — reuse fieldannotation, no new pm node

nodes.label: D10.2 — FieldAnnotation Conventions (fieldId, displayLabel, fieldType)
nodes.rationale: fieldId = 'mm-' + slug(name) + '-' + <docsize> + '-' + slug(label) (unique per insert); displayLabel = '«'+name+'»' (= defaultDisplayLabel); fieldType = the field code verbatim; type='text'.

nodes.label: D10.3 — Export: Branch translateFieldAnnotation for Real Field OOXML
nodes.rationale: Branch placed right after const { attrs = {} } = node; (before annotationHandler guard and isFinalDoc return, so it runs on both paths). MERGEFIELD/GREETINGLINE → w:fldSimple. ADDRESSBLOCK → buildComplexFieldRuns (5-run). NEXT/NEXTIF/MERGEREC/MERGESEQ/SET/ASK/SKIPIF → buildEmptyComplexFieldRuns (3-run, no separate, no cached run). Non-merge fieldAnnotations fall through to existing w:sdt path.
nodes.norm_label: d10.3 — export: branch translatefieldannotation for real field ooxml

nodes.label: D10.4 — Import: Preprocessor + NodeTranslator + V2 Handler Entity (3 Edits)
nodes.rationale: (a) mergefield-preprocessor.js → sd:mergeField OpenXmlNode. (b) sd/mergeField/mergeField-translator.js via NodeTranslator.from(config) whose encode → {type:'fieldAnnotation', attrs} (flag-independent), decode = () => null. (c) mergefieldImporter.js → generateV2HandlerEntity('mergeFieldHandler', translator) inserted into defaultNodeListHandler entities BEFORE passthroughNodeHandlerEntity.
nodes.norm_label: d10.4 — import: preprocessor + nodetranslator + v2 handler entity (3 edits)

nodes.label: D10.5 — Recipient Data + Match Stay Clone-Owned in WC.Mail
nodes.rationale: Clone's mail-merge engine + recipient/match data model stay clone-owned (spec §9.3 carve-out); only document-mutation calls move to bridge/mail.ts.
nodes.norm_label: d10.5 — recipient data + match stay clone-owned in wc.mail

nodes.label: D10.6 — Preview is Non-Destructive on PM (No setHTML)
nodes.rationale: previewResults(on) → PM.mmPreview(valuesMap) → updateFieldAnnotations(fieldId, {displayLabel:<value>}) per field; OFF → mmPreview(null) restores «name». NO setHTML. Field NAME survives because mmPreview reads defaultDisplayLabel (stamped once, never overwritten), not the live displayLabel.
nodes.norm_label: d10.6 — preview is non-destructive on pm (no sethtml)

nodes.label: D10.7 — Highlight via FieldAnnotation Node Attr
nodes.rationale: PM.mmHighlight(on) → setFieldAnnotationsHighlighted(n => n.attrs.fieldType != null, on).
nodes.norm_label: d10.7 — highlight via fieldannotation node attr

nodes.label: D10.8 — Finish & Merge via PM-Aware Builder (openHtml, Never Legacy newDocWith)
nodes.rationale: PM.mmBuildMerge(recipients, valueResolver) builds merged body from PM.getHTML(), matching PM annotation DOM (span.annotation[data-field-type], name from data-display-label), substituting values via composite()/_val, joined with page-break divs. finishMerge('edit') loads result through PM.openHtml(mergedHtml), never legacy WC.Files.newDocWith.
nodes.norm_label: d10.8 — finish & merge via pm-aware builder (openhtml, never legacy newdocwith)

nodes.label: D10.9 — Rule Fields: Structural Export, Semantics Deferred (Ledger C)
nodes.rationale: IF/FILLIN/ASK/SKIPIF/SET/MERGEREC/MERGESEQ/NEXT/NEXTIF insert as fieldAnnotations and export as structurally valid field codes (empty-complex form). Word IF evaluation is NOT in scope — legacy label 'Equal to' is not Word's operator syntax '='; operator mapping deferred to ledger C. MERGEFIELD/GREETINGLINE/ADDRESSBLOCK/NEXT are the real-fidelity core.
nodes.norm_label: d10.9 — rule fields: structural export, semantics deferred (ledger c)

nodes.label: D10.10 — Envelopes/Labels: Real PM Model Now, Visual Phase-7 (Ledger A)
nodes.rationale: envelopes → real PM paragraphs; labels → real PM table (slice-6 table bridge) + NEXT fields; updateLabels propagates within PM table guarded on a wc-labels marker. Page geometry (Avery-grid fidelity) deferred to Phase 7.
nodes.norm_label: d10.10 — envelopes/labels: real pm model now, visual phase-7 (ledger a)

nodes.label: D10.11 — [0a] D6 Guard Repoint (margins/header, Phase-7-Gated)
nodes.rationale: Commands.run head → margins (layout-page); Commands.dropdown head → header (header-footer). Must land in Task 1 BEFORE the flip (K-6). Both areas absent from FLIPPED → stay blocked through slice 11.

nodes.label: D10.12 — Composite Import Data-Loss Scoped (Ledger C)
nodes.rationale: Import encode discards node.elements (cached runs) and reconstructs displayLabel from the instruction. For MERGEFIELD this is lossless. For a previewed/merged ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE source the rendered multi-line text is replaced by the «AddressBlock» placeholder. Recorded as a deviation — importing a placeholder field, not the merged text. Acceptable for slice 10; ledger-C entry required.
nodes.norm_label: d10.12 — composite import data-loss scoped (ledger c)

nodes.label: K-1 Risk — addFieldAnnotationAtSelection Returns True Even on No-Op
nodes.norm_label: k-1 risk — addfieldannotationatselection returns true even on no-op

nodes.label: K-9 Risk — Finish-Merge PM Shape (Legacy fill() DEAD in PM)
nodes.rationale: Legacy fill() selects .wc-mergefield + reads the empty legacy editor — DEAD in PM. The PM-aware mmBuildMerge (D10.8) is mandatory.
nodes.norm_label: k-9 risk — finish-merge pm shape (legacy fill() dead in pm)

nodes.label: K-10 Risk — NEXT Run-Count (Must Use 3-Run buildEmptyComplexFieldRuns)
nodes.rationale: buildComplexFieldRuns always emits 5 runs including a spurious «Next Record»; NEXT must use the 3-run buildEmptyComplexFieldRuns (D10.3).
nodes.norm_label: k-10 risk — next run-count (must use 3-run buildemptycomplexfieldruns)

nodes.label: K-2 Risk — Annotations Flag Avoided by Dedicated Translator
nodes.rationale: handleAnnotationNode gates on editor.options.annotations which constructPmEditor never sets. The dedicated sd:mergeField translator (encode → {type:'fieldAnnotation', attrs}) is flag-independent — the correct path.
nodes.norm_label: k-2 risk — annotations flag avoided by dedicated translator

nodes.label: K-4 Risk — Leak Vectors (Every Mail-Merge Path Must Be PMA Re-Pointed)
nodes.norm_label: k-4 risk — leak vectors (every mail-merge path must be pma re-pointed)

nodes.label: K-5 Risk — Preview vs Merge (Read defaultDisplayLabel, Not Live displayLabel)
nodes.norm_label: k-5 risk — preview vs merge (read defaultdisplaylabel, not live displaylabel)

nodes.label: K-6 Risk — Guard Repoint Timing (Task 1 Before Flip Task 5)
nodes.norm_label: k-6 risk — guard repoint timing (task 1 before flip task 5)

nodes.label: K-8 Risk — Legacy 257 Frozen (PMA() Null Under --legacy → Byte-Identical)
nodes.norm_label: k-8 risk — legacy 257 frozen (pma() null under --legacy → byte-identical)

nodes.label: buildEmptyComplexFieldRuns — 3-Run Control Field Builder (NEXT etc.)
nodes.rationale: begin / instrText / end — no separate, no result run. Matches real Word's NEXT field representation.

nodes.label: buildSimpleFieldElement — w:fldSimple Builder (MERGEFIELD/GREETINGLINE)
nodes.rationale: w:fldSimple with w:instr=' MERGEFIELD Name '; w:r with w:rPr/w:noProof and w:t (no xml:space — «Name» has no edge whitespace). Exact oracle parity.

nodes.label: Oracle Leg A ROUNDTRIP_OK — Word Canonicalized fldSimple→fldChar (Benign)
nodes.rationale: Word canonicalized the compact w:fldSimple form to verbose w:fldChar/w:instrText on resave (benign — same live field). All 5 merge field codes preserved; underscore field name (Last_Name) intact. NO w:sdt leak; NO spurious «Next Record» result run for NEXT.
nodes.norm_label: oracle leg a roundtrip_ok — word canonicalized fldsimple→fldchar (benign)

nodes.label: Oracle Leg B Automated PASS — Real-Word Fixture Import via [10mm] Test
nodes.rationale: Fork importer additions (mergefield-preprocessor + sd:mergeField NodeTranslator + generateV2HandlerEntity in docxImporter) turn Word's w:fldSimple AND w:fldChar MERGEFIELD/ADDRESSBLOCK/GREETINGLINE/NEXT into fieldAnnotation PM nodes, flag-independently.
nodes.norm_label: oracle leg b automated pass — real-word fixture import via [10mm] test

nodes.norm_label: slice 10 oracle recorded deviations (if operator, composite import, envelopes)
